      "It is a lost painting.",
      "It is a work by American-born artist Benjamin West."
    ],

      "It has a highly allegorical composition.",
      "It has European, Black, and Native American refugees.",
      "It has Britannia presiding over the British Crown Jewels.",
      "It has angels and government officials surveying the scene."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by a highly allegorical composition.",
      "It is characterized by its depiction of the Black Loyalists.",
      "It is characterized by its survival through a pair of replicas."
    ],

      "It is used for depicting the return of the Loyalists to the British Empire.",
      "It is used for showing the welcoming of refugees back into the fold by Britannia."
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "It is located in the background of a later portrait of John Eardley Wilmot."
    ],

      "それは一対の複製によって生き残っていることで特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはロイヤリストのイギリス帝国への帰還を描写するために使用されます。",
      "それはブリタニアによって歓迎される難民を描写するために使用されます。"
    ],

      "それは女性で構成されています。",

    ],

      "それはベンジャミン・ウェストの以前の作品に影響を受けました。",
      "それはウェストの深い英国ナショナリズムの感覚に影響を受けました。",
      "それはアメリカ独立戦争の影響を受けた友人、家族、同僚に影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それはロイヤリストの कारणに対する理解に影響を与えました。",
      "それは黒人ロイヤリストの歴史的物語に影響を与えました。"
    ]
  }

IsA: It is a work by American-born artist Benjamin West.
HasA: It has a highly allegorical composition.
It has European, Black, and Native American refugees.
It has Britannia presiding over the British Crown Jewels.
It has angels and government officials surveying the scene.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a highly allegorical composition.
It is characterized by its depiction of the Black Loyalists.
It is characterized by its survival through a pair of replicas.
UsedFor: It is used for depicting the return of the Loyalists to the British Empire.
It is used for showing the welcoming of refugees back into the fold by Britannia.
LocatedIn: It is located in the background of a later portrait of John Eardley Wilmot.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the United States.
CreatedBy: It was created by Benjamin West.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Benjamin West.
CausedBy: It is caused by the American Revolutionary War.
Affects: It affects the perception of the Loyalist cause.
It affects the understanding of Black Loyalists' history.
ConsistsOf: It consists of European refugees.
It consists of Black refugees.
It consists of Native American refugees.
It consists of Britannia.
It consists of the British Crown Jewels.
It consists of angels.
It consists of government officials.
It consists of white lawmakers.
It consists of an Indigenous warrior.
It consists of a woman.
It consists of a family of Black Loyalists.
PartOf: It is part of a later portrait of John Eardley Wilmot.
MemberOf: It is a member of unknown.
KnownFor: It is known for its depiction of the Black Loyalists.
It is known for its allegorical composition.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Benjamin West.
It is associated with the return of the Loyalists.
It is associated with the Loyalist Claims Commission.
About: It is about the reception of American Loyalists by Great Britain.
It is about the expulsion of Loyalists from the United States.
It is about the welcoming of refugees by Britannia.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Benjamin West's previous work.
It was influenced by West's deep sense of British nationalism.
It was influenced by friends, family, and colleagues affected by the American Revolutionary War.
Influenced: It influenced the understanding of the Loyalist cause.
It influenced the historical narrative of Black Loyalists.
